title: Skyblock Tweaks (1.21) – Hypixel Skyblock
description: Hypixel Skyblock's most customizable 1.21 mod, providing many tweaks, HUDs, and other gameplay enhancements.
body:
# Skyblock Tweaks (Fabric 1.21)

Skyblock Tweaks is a Hypixel Skyblock mod for Fabric 1.21 that provides features to enhance the gameplay experience.

## Features

<details>
<summary>General</summary>

- Hub Selector Colors
- Other Menu Colors
  - HOTM and HOTF
  - /widget menu
  - /sblevel menu
  - Unclaimed Commissions 
  - Unclaimed Contests
  - Disabled Potion Effects
- Brewing Stand Overlay
- Minion EXP Overlay
- Reforge Filter Overlay
- Disable Inventory Potion HUD Rendering
- Redirect inventory recipe book to Skyblock recipe book
- Disable Action Bar Shadow
- Disable Boss Bar Rendering
- Disable Heart Rendering
  - Option for only outside of Rift
- Disable Armor Bar Rendering
- Disable Hunger Bar Rendering
- Disable Mount Health Rendering
- Action Bar Filters
  - Hide Health
  - Hide Defense
  - Hide Mana
  - Hide Ability Uses
  - Hide Skills
  - Hide Drill Fuel
  - Hide Secrets
  - Hide Rift Time
  - Hide Location Change 
  - Hide Pressure

</details>

<details>
<summary>Chat</summary>
  
- Party Commands
  - `!ptme`, `!allinvite`, and `/warp`
- /boop party invite prompts
- Chat Protections
  - /coopadd confirmation
  - IP message confirmation

</details>

<details>
<summary>HUDS</summary>
All HUDs are extremely customizable 
  
- SkyblockAddons style health and mana bars
  - Unlike some other mods, these can be positioned anywhere on the screen
- Skill Progress HUD
  - Customizable display and actions left
  - You may need to open `/skills` menu to load data for higher levels
- Skill Progress Bar
- Ticker/Charges HUD
- Armor stack HUD
- Rift Time HUD
- Health Number HUD
- Effective Health Number HUD
- Mana Number HUD
- Overflow Mana HUD
- Speed Percentage HUD
- Defense Number HUD
- Damage Reduction Percentage HUD
- Drill Fuel Bar
- Drill Fuel Number HUD
- Coordinates HUD
- FPS HUD
- Real Time HUD
- Rainmaker Timer HUD
- Dungeon Secret HUD
- Pressure HUD

</details>
<details>
<summary>Mining</summary>

- Mining HUD
  - Designed with the style of NEU, contains options for commisions, pickaxe cooldown, and all types of powders, and can be customized heavily.
- Event Timer HUD
- Customizable notifications for Golden and Diamond Goblins.
- Fetchur Solver
- Fetchur HUD

  </details>
<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

- `/sbt calc`
  - Allows you to calculate the required xp for wide variety of things in Skyblock
  - Currently supports the following subcommands
    - `/sbt calc skill` - Skill XP
    - `/sbt calc pet` - Pet XP
    - `/sbt calc slayer` - Slayer XP
    - `/sbt calc hotm` - HOTM XP
    - `/sbt calc garden` - Garden XP
    - `/sbt calc crop` - Crop Milestones
    - `/sbt calc powder` - Powder needed for upgrades
- `/sbt mouselock`
  - Locks and unlocks your mouse
</details>



SkyblockTweaks is still in Alpha, so expect many more awesome features on the way. SBT is designed to make someone used to 1.8 Skyblock mods feel right at home, and implements many features found in 1.8 mods that did not yet exist in sufficient quality/customizability or at all in 1.21 mods.

## Important Things

Use the `/sbt` command or ModMenu to open the SkyblockTweaks menu screen. From here, you can configure the mod (also `/sbt config`) and reposition HUDS (also `/sbt hud`).

SBT features are very modular, meaning you may need to change multiple settings to get things just the way you like them. For example, if you want health, mana, and defense removed from your action bar, you will need to manually enable those filters in the `Action Bar Filters` tab of `General`. Also please note that none of the HUDS are enabled by default currently, you will need to enable them in the `HUDS` tab.

## Feedback, Suggestions, Support, and Bug Reports
I (MisterCheezeCake) really value user feedback, and I want to make SBT into the best mod it can be. If you have feature requests/suggestions, notice any bugs, or need support, please open an issue on GitHub or in the appropriate Discord channel.
